name: Coconut Chicken Curry
instructions:
1. Slice chicken breast into bite-sized pieces.

2. Heat vegetable oil in a skillet over medium-high heat. Add chopped onion and cook for 2 minutes until softened.

3. Add minced garlic and grated ginger, cook for 30 seconds until fragrant.

4. Add curry powder, stir to coat the onions and cook for 15 seconds.

5. Add chicken pieces to the pan. Stir-fry for 3-4 minutes until chicken is no longer pink on the outside.

6. Pour in coconut milk, stir well. Bring to a gentle simmer.

7. Reduce heat to medium-low, season with salt. Cook for 4-5 minutes until chicken is cooked through and sauce has thickened slightly.

8. Serve hot over rice or with bread.
simpleInstructions:
1. Slice chicken into bite-sized pieces.

2. Sauté onion in oil until softened, 2 minutes.

3. Add garlic and ginger, cook 30 seconds.

4. Add curry powder, stir, cook 15 seconds.

5. Add chicken, stir-fry 3-4 minutes.

6. Pour in coconut milk, bring to simmer.

7. Season with salt, cook 4-5 minutes more.

8. Serve over rice or with bread.
